rationale: Review 1's main placement finding is confirmed by the diff: the public API is generic bialgebra/Hopf-algebra convolution material, not actual algebraic-group or functor-of-points infrastructure, so moving it to dedicated Bialgebra/HopfAlgebra files would improve the PR more. Review 2 catches a real narrower namespace/file-placement issue for `antipode_convMul_id`, but acting only on that leaves the broader misplaced generic API in `AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean`.
